title: Finally some positive confirmation about 3010 not being in total limbo
display_title: Finally some positive confirmation about 3010 not being in total limbo
wikitext:
[]: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Chainer3000 » Fri Sep 16, 2016 10:36 am http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/20 ... ts/.106523 The bit that matters: Anno also responded to a remark from an audience member saying that he/she would wait as long as it took for the fourth Rebuild of Evangelion film. He first thanked the audience, and then said, "I'll work hard on it. As a matter of fact, I'm already working hard on it." And he's not looking to do a sequel for Shin Godzilla It's not much, but it's a lot better than what we've had recently.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by StrokeMeGoat » Fri Sep 16, 2016 12:57 pm Thank god, I've pretended to stop caring for a long time now, but I really can't wait.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Oct 14, 2016 2:54 pm So when might we get it? Next year? The year after that?

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Ray » Fri Oct 14, 2016 2:56 pm If they've only just begun production on the animation side of things now. Then probably not for at least three more years. Hopefully the world doesn't end before then.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Oct 14, 2016 3:15 pm I doubt any of the Rebuild films actually take three years to animate. Once everything is in place actual animation for a feature film roughly takes a year. Pixar only spends about 15 months actually animating one of their feature films, the other three to four years of production are spent on prepping everything from story to look to begin animation. Pre-production is the lenghty part of making an animated feature. Hopefully during the downtime a lot of pre-production work - the look of new Evas/character/locations introduced in the film - got finalized. Either way, the fans are in total limbo until they give us information. So just do your thing until then.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Oct 14, 2016 5:18 pm Ray wrote: Hopefully the world doesn't end before then.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Oct 14, 2016 5:28 pm Guy Nacks wrote: If it does, all of our immortal souls will haunt Anno's for eternity.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Oct 14, 2016 9:19 pm Well, consider this. We got the first movie in 2007. The second movie came out in 2009. The third movie didn't come out until 2012. Based on that 3-year gap, a lot of us were expecting the fourth movie to come out in 2015 to coincide with the series's 20th anniversary. But it's 2016 now, and work on the movie either hasn't started or is in a very early state. So given how long the other movies took, I'd expect the fourth one in 2018.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Ray » Wed Oct 26, 2016 1:46 am Can anyone confirm if this is legit? If it is it was posted a few days ago. Megumi Ogata posted a tweet that seems to confirm that they are recording voices. I can't find the original tweet but someone posted a translation of it on Tumblr. Basically someone on her Twitter feed asked her a question About Final and this is her response to it. Megumi Ogata wrote: No, so… I think it’s kind of difficult to ask when it’s so soon…? In that movie everyone’s been asking about, the engineers have really been squeezing the volume out of me… (^^; < Shinji’s shouting But even still, discomfort is discomfort. What’s ok is everyone being satisfied with his heart, I think. Thank you for cheering me on. (^-^)

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by 1731298478 » Wed Oct 26, 2016 3:13 am (What follows assumes I have not misunderstood anything...) Here is the tweet Ogata-san was replying to: https://mobile.twitter.com/kyo_apli/sta ... 2414824448 Basically it says Ogata's technique is so good, that Shinji's screaming voice never becomes painful or headache inducing, even if you listen to it continually. Here is the Ogata tweet in question: https://mobile.twitter.com/Megumi_Ogata ... 8996847616 She says that it would probably be otherwise if you had heard (Shinji's screaming voice) in person (間近で), because the version everyone hears onscreen has had the volume greatly reduced by the engineer! However, even if it was painful, it's okay because the viewers have connected with or understood Shinji, and she thanks them for their support. Yuko Miyamura's response: https://mobile.twitter.com/386miyamura/ ... 8326233089 She says even in person it is not painful or anything like that, and Ogata-san should keep screaming as much as she wants in the future!

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Ray » Wed Oct 26, 2016 3:24 am I thought she meant by 'Squeeze the volume out if her' that they were making her scream for more scenes in the final movie. Still this does seem to confirm they are at least recording voices. . . Anno records voices before animation begins right? Ghibli does it the other way around, they animate the whole movie and then record the voices. And it looks like poor Suffering Shinji won't be catatonic for the whole movie. If he's going to be screaming it's likely he'll at least have a few lines.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 26, 2016 4:03 am I'm not seeing any indication that the tweets have anything to do with the last movie.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by 1731298478 » Wed Oct 26, 2016 4:04 am Ray wrote: I thought she meant by 'Squeeze the volume out if her' that they were making her scream for more scenes in the final movie.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Oct 26, 2016 9:03 am Ogata talks about her past voice work all the time on her twitter and she definitely isn't the type to leak things. This is non-news. Actual news will come through proper channels.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Oct 28, 2016 6:48 am Reichu wrote: I'm not seeing any indication that the tweets have anything to do with the last movie.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Lennik » Sat Oct 29, 2016 3:24 pm I hope he does a lot of screaming anyway. Shinji becomes a lot more interesting when he lets it all out.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Ray » Sat Oct 29, 2016 4:16 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: There's no reason to think that this is a reference to any new Shinji screaming in Shin Eva.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 29, 2016 6:29 pm Numbers provided a translation that was properly in context. If you'll notice, "In that movie everyone’s been asking about" is actually "that everyone heard onscreen [that is, via film/video]", and this "squeezing the volume out of" flub you're fixated on was corrected, with a citation and everything. You're not going to magically make news manifest by beating an obsolete and out-of-context translation dead. Regarding this "have been" business, Japanese does not have anything directly equivalent to the English past perfect tense. Such stark divergences in grammar are commonplace and speak to the hazards of overanalyzing a translation choice when one has no ability to consult the thing actually being translated.

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by 1731298478 » Sat Oct 29, 2016 9:25 pm Ray wrote: What movie other than Final would they be asking her about?

[]: Re: Finally *some* positive confirmation about 3.0+1.0 not being in total limbo Post by Sachi » Sat Oct 29, 2016 9:33 pm Ray wrote: What movie other than Final would they be asking her about?
